recommendations.title: Bachelorette
recommendations.overview: Three friends are asked to be bridesmaids at a wedding of a woman they used to ridicule back in high school.

recommendations.title: Senior Year
recommendations.overview: A 37-year-old woman wakes up from a 22-year coma, and returns to the high school where she was once a popular cheerleader to finish her senior year and become prom queen.

recommendations.title: Charlie Bartlett
recommendations.overview: Awkward teenager Charlie Bartlett has trouble fitting in at a new high school. Charlie needs some friends fast, and decides that the best way to find them is to appoint himself the resident psychiatrist. He becomes one of the most popular guys in sch

recommendations.title: Dude
recommendations.overview: Four best friends negotiate loss and major life changes during the last two weeks of high school.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: Full of It
recommendations.overview: A teenager tells outrageous lies at his new high school, only to have them suddenly come true.

recommendations.title: Back to School
recommendations.overview: Two adults go to their middle school reunion in order to show off their success to old bullies teenage crushes.

recommendations.title: I Don't Want to Go Back Alone
recommendations.overview: The arrival of a new student in school changes Leonardo's life. This 15 year-old blind teenager has to deal with the jealousy of his friend Giovana while figuring out the new feelings he's having towards his new friend, Gabriel.

recommendations.title: Sierra Burgess Is a Loser
recommendations.overview: A case of mistaken identity results in unexpected romance when the most popular girl in high school and the biggest loser must come together to win over their crushes.

recommendations.title: Teen Spirit
recommendations.overview: Amber, a mean popular girl who gets electrocuted and dies, is not allowed to enter into heaven unless she helps the least popular girl in school become Prom Queen within a week, but things do not go as planned.
